title: Redesign Select Objects Bar with Collapsible Toggle and Reusable Component
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Select Objects bar to be hidden by default with a clear button to reveal it, so that I have more screen space and always know how to manage my objects.
description:
User feedback identified two issues with the current Select Objects toolbar:
1. It takes up too much screen space
2. Once hidden via toggle, users forget how to re-show it

## New Behavior
1. **No objects selected**: Object management toolbar is visible by default and cannot be hidden until at least one object is added
2. **Objects selected**: Toolbar is hidden by default. A "Select Objects" button on the left reveals the toolbar via a CSS slide-up animation
3. **Closing**: A close button in the upper right slides the toolbar closed with a CSS transition
4. **Dropdown**: The object selection dropdown remains visible until the user clicks outside of it
5. **Toggle removal**: The old show/hide toggle UI control is removed — replaced by the two explicit buttons

## Reusability
- Code abstracted so it can be reused on Dictionary, Migration, and ERD pages (see MBT-764)
- Eliminates the old alert that appeared when navigating to ERD with no objects selected
acceptance_criteria: Select Objects toolbar is hidden by default when objects are already selected
Select Objects toolbar is visible and cannot be hidden when no objects are selected
Clicking Select Objects button reveals the toolbar with a CSS slide-up animation
Close button slides the toolbar closed with a CSS transition
Object selection dropdown stays visible until user clicks outside
Old toggle UI control is removed
Component code is centralized and reusable across Dictionary, Migration, and ERD pages
No alert appears when navigating to ERD with no objects
ux_changes: Select Objects bar redesigned: hidden by default with explicit open/close buttons, slide-up/down CSS transitions. Old toggle control removed. Forced visible state when no objects are selected.
middleware_changes: Object selection component code centralized into a reusable module shared across Dictionary, Migration, and ERD pages.
implementation_notes: Developer centralized the object selection code so it can be reused on Dictionary, Migration, and ERD pages. Branch created from staging. Old ERD no-objects alert removed since the toolbar now forces itself visible when no objects are selected. CSS transitions used for slide-up/down animations.
comment_summary: Developer centralized the component for reuse across three pages. Implemented slide transitions and the forced-visible state. Product owner praised the result. Noted that the old ERD alert for no objects should be removed since the new design handles that case.
